faqs.question: How do I know if I have carpenter ants in my Harrison home?
faqs.answer: Common signs include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or wooden structures, rustling sounds inside walls, and seeing large black ants especially during spring evenings. Carpenter ants are typically active at dusk and are larger than common household ants, ranging from ¼ to ½ inch long.

faqs.question: What does carpenter ant control cost in Harrison, NY?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control services in Harrison typically range from $350 to $2,000 depending on the extent of infestation, size of your property, and number of colonies present. Minor treatments for single-family homes start around $350, while extensive infestations requiring multiple treatments and structural repairs can reach $2,000 or more.
